chara_kris_title_chapter_4:
Dark Hero
Carries out fate
with the blade.
chara_susie_title_chapter_4:
Dark Hero
Carries out fate
with the blade.
chara_ralsei_title_chapter_4:
Dark Hero
Records and faces
the fate.
spell_rude_buster_description:
Deals moderate Rude-elemental damage to
one foe. Depends on Attack & Magic.
spell_ultimate_heal_description:
Heals 1 party member to the
best of [name:chara:susie]'s ability.
spell_pacify_description: SPARE a tired enemy by putting them to sleep.
spell_heal_prayer_description:
Heavenly light restores a little HP to
one party member. Depends on Magic.
enemy_dummy_check:
AT 4 DF 0
* Cotton heart and button eye
* Looks just like a fluffy guy.
enemy_dummy_turn_1:
* The dummy gives you a soft
smile.
enemy_dummy_turn_2:
* The power of fluffy boys is
in the air.
enemy_dummy_low_health:
* The dummy looks like it's
about to fall over.
act_dummy_smile_1:
* You smile.[wait:5]
* The dummy smiles back.
act_dummy_smile_2:
* It seems the dummy just wanted
to see you happy.
act_dummy_tell_story_text:
* You and [name:chara:ralsei] told the dummy
a bedtime story.
* The enemies became [color:blue]TIRED[color:reset]...
act_dummy_ralsei_standard:
* [name:chara:ralsei] bowed politely.
* The dummy spiritually bowed
in return.
battle_dummy_susie_punch_1:
* [name:chara:susie] threw a punch at
the dummy.
battle_dummy_susie_punch_2:
* You,[wait:5] uh,[wait:5] look like a weenie.[wait:5]
* I don't like beating up
people like that.
world_room1_wall_susie_break:
* Hey,[wait:5] think I can break
this wall?
world_room1_savepoint_1:
* Silence echoes in the darkness
of this familiar-yet-different
scenery.
world_room1_savepoint_2:
* The power of avoiding copying
official music shines within
you.
world_room1_wall_guardian_1:
* I Am the Wall Guardian.[wait:5]
* This Wall is Off Limits for you
no-good wall slammers.
item_glowshard_description_chapter_1:
A shimmering shard.
Its use is unknown.
item_glowshard_description:
A shimmering shard.
Its value increases each Chapter.
item_darkburger_description:
A mysterious black burger made of...
Hey, this is just burnt! +70HP
item_cell_phone_description: It can be used to make calls.
item_cell_phone_call_try:
* (You tried to call on the Cell
Phone.)
item_cell_phone_call_not_working: * But it doesn't seem to be working.
item_shadowcrystal_description: A sharp shadow moves like water in the hand.
item_shadowcrystal_use_1:
* You held the crystal up to your
eye.
item_wood_blade_description:
A wooden practice blade with a carbon-
reinforced core.
item_mane_ax_description:
Beginner's ax forged from the
mane of a dragon whelp.
item_red_scarf_description:
A basic scarf made of lightly
magical fiber.
item_amber_card_description:
A thin square charm that sticks
to you, increasing defense.
item_ultimate_candy_description:
Sparkles with perfection.
Must be shared with everyone. +??HP
